DECLARATION OF RODNEY HAMPTON
MINUTES
(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA=TROW. COURT ENTERS A JUDGMENT OF PARENTAGE AS TO
MOTHER FOR MINOR BORN 8/3/90; COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER PAY CHILD SUPPORT $200.00 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 11/1/00; MOTHER IS TO
GATE MOTHER'S OTHER CHILD SUPPORT CASE IN THIS COUNTY; COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION TO RETROACTIVELY MODIFY SUPPORT; BOTH PARTIES SHALL EQUALLY DIVIDE
AM IN ROOM #416. (WIGHTMAN)  PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARIA TORREANO CSR #8600

MINUTES
(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA=MCCALLY. BY STIPULATION OF PARTIES, COURT ORDERS
THAT FATHER PAY CHILD SUPPORT $385.00 PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 11/1/00; COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION TO MODIFY SUPPORT; FATHER SHALL
PARTIES TO EQUALLY SHARE THE COST OF RALLY; FOLLOWING THE FOUR SUNDAY VISITATIONS, FATHER SHALL HAVE ALTERNATE WEEKEND OVERNIGHT VISITATIONS FROM
THE NAME/PHONE NUMBER OF THAT NEIGHBOR; EACH PARTY TO REFRAIN FROM SPEAKING NEGATIVELY ABOUT THE OTHER IN FRONT OF THE MINOR; FATHER IS PROHIBITED
IS ADDED TO CALENDAR ON 12/5/00 @ 8:30 AM IN ROOM #416 IN ORDER TO PLACE CHILD SUPPORT ON RECORD; FATHER IS EXCUSED FROM APPEARING. (WIGHTMAN)
(UNREPORTED)ALENDAR ON 12/5/00 @ 8:30 AM IN ROOM #416 IN ORDER TO PLACE CHILD SUPPORT ON RECORD; FATHER IS EXCUSED FROM APPEARING. (WIGHTMAN)
